title: PhantomEye's Cassette Tapes
description: Replace your Music Discs with Cassette Tapes!
body:
You ever thought Music Discs in Minecraft were boring?

Well then you're in luck! Listen to bangers in style with these crisp
**Cassette Tape** textures. 
Get your Walkman ready!

Textures by PhantomEye (me !!)

## Item Frame
![Cassette Tape in Item Frame above Jukebox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a1ce8b02619868646ed2623988b1f72af4e0894.png)

## Creative Inventory
![Cassette Tapes in Creative Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rbtMiuc/images/01a901afe0c485b7f5190b8541ad3ab2855319b2.png)

## Comparison with Vanilla
![Cassette Tape textures compared to Vanilla Music Disc textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rbtMiuc/images/b5b76782950d912f3f5fd809dd89563f038d0fdf.png)

Thanks for downloading!
